title: Location
description: One place. DERIVED from the authored packs/*/locations corpus (SNG-BATCH-9 build-step-1) — the authored set is cleanly uniform (all 26 carry the same 14 fields), so those 14 are `required`. generate('location', ctx) authors to this shape in-grain from the arriving location's poleIntensity (± a rolled asymmetric secondary axis, per the substrate's asymmetry rule); repair fills any required field the model omits (map coords from the parent + offset, communityId/loreRefs from context, empty arrays where apt). Optional fields (dangerLevel, npcsPresent, seedFiction/nativeLogic for manifest domains, encounterSeeds, image) are added when the grain calls for them.

id.description: stable slug; generated places mint via the SNG-019 resolver (resolve-before-mint)

regionId.description: e.g. valley; a generated place inherits the arriving region

spectrum.description: disposition fingerprint: axisId -> [-1,1] (same 14-axis vocabulary as NPC.spectrum). Generated in-grain: keep the locale's dominant axis; roll the secondary axis varied so the next place over is in-grain but surprising.

poleIntensity.description: single-ended intensities (pole -> 0..1) driving affinities + drift (SNG-022 derives this from spectrum when absent). Known poles: abstract/concrete, dark/light, space/time, truth/falsehood, mechanical/spiritual, chaos/order, individual/collective, death/life, violence/peace, destruction/creation, demonic/angelic, body/mind, emotional/logical, tradition/innovation.

connections.description: adjacent location ids; a generated place connects back to the location it was reached from

descriptionSeed.description: the sensory establishing text; the taste-carrier for place voice

questSeeds.description: hooks the GM can pull; may be empty

encounterSeeds.description: either a bare encounterId string or a {encounterId, hint} object — the authored corpus uses both

seedFiction.description: manifest-domain: the fiction this place runs on as native law

nativeLogic.description: manifest-domain: the rules-as-law the GM enforces inside

axisVector.description: optional numeric 12-axis disposition vector (some authored places carry it alongside spectrum)

rating.description: content-rating tag stamped at generation (SNG-BATCH-9 §3); absent on authored core

waygate.description: SNG-148: this location is a waygate — a node in the gate network

waygateTier.description: SNG-148: how hard this gate is to AIM at (wayfaringTier gate); default 1

waygateHub.description: SNG-148: the network hub (the Crossing) — every unaimed transit lands here
